data.name: SM的誘惑遊戲
data.detailed_description:
◇特色系統：


◇在環境設定裡能打開全ＣＧ模式－自由瀏覽ＨＣＧ
◆無壓力操作設計－快速的文字跳轉系統
◇提供全攻略提示
◆提供好感度及ＳＭ值數值顯示

◇故事：


我腦中浮現兩個想法，先對她俯首稱臣，讓她對我沉淪後再逆轉，女人一但陷入愛情總是盲目而不自知。
尤其是這種事業有成女強人，我能想像她若非跟Ｍ男交往，情感肯定是不順的，說不定連Ｍ男都無法忍受她。
要讓這種女人愛上我是輕而易舉。
「昨晚的事情妳可別想算了。」我對她如此宣布。
「呵呵……所以呢？你想用這個威脅我？若我不答應你，你要去傳范梓琳是個虐待狂？還是要叫你老爸開除我？」
「你認為我會害怕這種事？」



「你成功惹火我了，小屁孩。既然你希望我模糊界線，那麼我就如你所願。以「郡主」的身分陪你玩。」
「來吧，你想我怎麼陪你玩？小屁孩。」
她一腳踩在我的肩上，高跟鞋壓得我刺刺生疼，一股熱流刺激著我的血液，我盯著她狂傲不羈的表情，硬了。
「來吧，像條狗討好我，我會陪你玩的。」



★音效素材感謝：
■甘茶の音楽工房
■DOVA-SYNDROME
■くらげ工匠
■魔王魂
■Moon☆Wind
■MusMus
■ニコニ・コモンズ
■ノスタルジア
■On-Jin ～音人～
■OtoLogic
■ポケットサウンド
■小森平
■ユーフルカ

data.short_description: 我叫羅倫，SM與其說是我的興趣，更像是我生活的一部分。 我最喜歡的約調對象是女S，那比只跟M玩更刺激。 嘿，我知道你們肯定有人無法認同，那又怎麼樣？最近我回到國內，在表哥的SM俱樂部下認識了個女S。 真他媽…太美了。 我想狠狠將她踩在腳底下、蹂躪她、欺負她、疼愛她。 你…會幫我吧？
data.supported_languages: 繁體中文, 英文, 德文, 俄文, 泰文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: WIN10/XP
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間

data.name: Game of seduction
data.detailed_description:
◇Feature System：

 
◇Enable Full CG Mode in the environment settings - Free browsing of HCG (adult content).
◆Stress-free operation design - Quick text skipping system.
◇Provide comprehensive walkthrough hints.
◆Display affection level and SM value.

◇ Story:

In my mind, two ideas emerged. First, I would submit to her and make her fall for me before reversing the situation. Once a woman is in love, she becomes blind and unaware.
Especially for a successful career woman like her, I can imagine that her emotional life would likely be turbulent if she weren't involved with a male M. It's possible that even a submissive male M wouldn't be able to tolerate her.
Making a woman like her fall in love with me would be easy.
「Don't think you can just let last night's incident go like that.」I declared to her.。
「Hehe... So what? Are you trying to threaten me with that? If I don't agree, are you going to expose that Zilin Fan as a sadist? Or have your dad fire me?」
「Do you think I'm afraid of such things?」



「You've successfully provoked me, little brat. Since you want me to blur the boundaries, I'll grant your wish. I'll play along with you as ‘Princess.’」
「Come on, how do you want me to play with you? Little brat.」
She pressed her high-heeled shoe onto my shoulder, causing a sharp pain that sent a rush of heat through my veins. I stared at her arrogantly defiant expression, and I became aroused.
「Come on, behave like a dog and please me. I'll play with you.」



★Sound effects thanks to the following
■甘茶の音楽工房
■DOVA-SYNDROME
■くらげ工匠
■魔王魂
■Moon☆Wind
■MusMus
■ニコニ・コモンズ
■ノスタルジア
■On-Jin ～音人～
■OtoLogic
■ポケットサウンド
■小森平
■ユーフルカ

data.short_description: My name is Lun Luo, and SM is not just an interest for me but a part of my life. My favourite play partner is a female S, as it adds an extra level of excitement compared to playing with an M partner. Recently, I met a female submissive at my cousin's SM club. I want to dominate, trample, tease, and love her in my own way.
data.supported_languages: Traditional Chinese, English, German, Russian, Thai, Simplified Chinese

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: WIN10/XP
  • Processor: 1.2 GHz
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9 compatible graphics card
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
